Projects.title: Avalon
Projects.description: AVALON is a new kind of game, a boundless realm where players empowered by AI can forge their own worlds.
Projects.about: At Avalon, I worked as a generalist, contributing to multiple areas of the project and supporting the team wherever needed. My work ranged from gameplay systems to AI behavior and bug fixing across different game systems.

Projects.title: Uniqkiller
Projects.description: Uniqkiller is a free-to-play multiplayer top-down shooter where you customize unique heroes and battle in fast-paced urban PvP combat.
Projects.about: At Uniqkiller, I led the implementation of Unreal’s Gameplay Ability System (GAS), designing and building a custom skill architecture with a progression-based skill tree. I also developed the complete skill tree UI, integrating unlock logic and progression flow. Beyond that, I contributed to multiple gameplay systems and supported the team with bug fixing and performance optimizations.

Projects.title: AAA Project over NDA
Projects.description: A very popular game from a big studio, with millions of players worldwide (Over NDA contract).
Projects.about: In this project, I worked extensively on the rendering pipeline using DirectX 11 and Metal, focusing on performance optimization, GPU efficiency, and overall rendering improvements.

Projects.title: Online pool Game
Projects.description: An online 2x2 multiplayer game developed for a web platform featuring multiple competitive mini-games.
Projects.about: I independently built the full client-server architecture, with a Linux-based backend and a Unity WebGL client. I managed secure deployment over WSS and developed custom JavaScript bridges to integrate the website frontend with the Unity WebGL build, enabling real-time communication and data exchange between the page and the game.

Projects.title: Online Truco – A South American Trick-Taking Card Game
Projects.description: An online 2x2 multiplayer game developed for a web platform featuring multiple competitive mini-games.
Projects.about: I independently built the full client-server architecture, with a Linux-based backend and a Unity WebGL client. I managed secure deployment over WSS and developed custom JavaScript bridges to integrate the website frontend with the Unity WebGL build, enabling real-time communication and data exchange between the page and the game.

Projects.title: Online Chess Game
Projects.description: An online 2x2 multiplayer game developed for a web platform featuring multiple competitive mini-games.
Projects.about: I independently built the full client-server architecture, with a Linux-based backend and a Unity WebGL client. I managed secure deployment over WSS and developed custom JavaScript bridges to integrate the website frontend with the Unity WebGL build, enabling real-time communication and data exchange between the page and the game.

Projects.title: Route Raiders
Projects.description: A location based game mobile, where player can find routes, treasures, collect items and complete challenges to get rewards in the real world
Projects.about: Full-stack location-based adventure app built solo, featuring .NET Core backend, Angular CMS, Unity game with Mapbox, JWT login, real-time positioning, dynamic quests, collectibles, QR-based rewards, and automated DevOps deployment.

Projects.title: Builder Scenes
Projects.description: Builder scenes is a tool that allows users to create and customize their own scenes using assets as materials, 3d models, light configuration, camera configurations, etc.
Projects.about: Unity-based real-time scene builder developed for Creative Drive (now Accenture), enabling users to configure environments and generate photorealistic renders through a VRay-integrated pipeline.

Projects.title: WKSP Rumble Arena
Projects.description: Fighting game with more than 100 characters, where players can fight in different arenas, and icludes a story mode
Projects.about: Solo-developed 2D fighting game featuring over 100 unique characters, built with a scalable archetype system, automated asset pipeline, custom hitbox logic, AI state machines, and full gameplay flow implementation.

Projects.title: The last of pawns
Projects.description: Hypercasual game based on peg solitaire, where players have diferent layouts to solve.
Projects.about: A hyper-casual puzzle game inspired by Peg Solitaire, developed independently in Unity (C#). Each level features a unique board layout, created using a custom editor tool built to streamline level design. The project includes fully animated gameplay and UI systems using Animation Curves and Coroutines, along with integrated Android ads and in-app purchases.

Projects.title: Space Invaders
Projects.description: Case of study where I explore c++ and SFML and copy the classic Space Invaders game.
Projects.about: This case study was created to explore and experiment with SFML using C++. The primary goal was to deepen my understanding of low-level game loop architecture, manual rendering pipelines, and custom physics implementation without relying on a full-featured game engine.

Projects.title: Root Engine
Projects.description: Case of study where I explore engine programming and create a simple engine with c++ DX11.
Projects.about: The purpose of this study was to design and build a modular real-time 3D engine (RootEngine) in C++ using DirectX 11, focusing on understanding low-level rendering,asset pipelines, animation systems, input abstraction, and editor architecture.

Projects.title: Pong console online
Projects.description: Case of study where I boost library and create a simple pong game rendered as text in command prompt, with online multiplayer.
Projects.about: The goal of this study was to deeply understand WebSocket communication, real-time message exchange, and low-level network architecture using C++. Instead of relying on game engines or networking frameworks, the objective was to manually implement the full client-server communication pipeline.

Projects.title: AutoBattle Console
Projects.description: Case of study where I boost library and create a simple auto battle game rendered as text in command prompt.
Projects.about: This project was developed as a technical challenge to explore design patterns, clean architecture, and core turn-based combat systems using modern C++. The focus was on refactoring and extending the initial implementation, applying the Command Pattern to decouple behavior logic from character data, and improving modularity, readability, and extensibility of the combat simulation.

WorkExperiences.title: Gameplay Engineer
WorkExperiences.description: Worked on an MMO with User Generated Content (UGC) features using Unreal Engine (C++ and Blueprints). Implemented gameplay systems including AI behavior trees, UI features and multiplayer RPC communication. Developed systems and tools supporting persistent data and world-building workflows for player-created content.

WorkExperiences.title: Gameplay Engineer
WorkExperiences.description: Worked on a multiplayer title using Unreal Engine (C++), contributing to gameplay systems development. Refactored the attribute system to integrate with Unreal Gameplay Ability System (GAS). Designed and implemented a skills system and progression-based skill tree.

WorkExperiences.title: Gameplay Engineer
WorkExperiences.description: Worked on an AA title (Unity, C#) and later on a globally recognized AAA franchise (C++, DX11, Metal, PS4) under NDA, focusing on rendering systems and engine performance optimization. Collaborated with cross-platform teams to improve performance and rendering pipelines across PC and consoles.

WorkExperiences.title: Gameplay Engineer
WorkExperiences.description: Worked as C#/Unity programmer implementing new features and bug fixes in company proprietary software, used to create CGI scenes to be rendered in Vray

WorkExperiences.title: Gameplay Engineer
WorkExperiences.description: Worked C# Unity, C++ and Unreal, .NET core MVC, Angular and TypeScript.
